_meta.method: Web research of Plum Village Joyful Garden Sangha, Soto Zen Singapore (Sotoshu directory), Dharma Drum Singapore.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Medium-high for institutional Zen presence. Singapore's Zen scene is small relative to its Mahayana / Theravada Buddhist communities.
knownGaps: Sanbo Zen Singapore (small) not separately verified with sourceable URL.

places.name: Joyful Garden Sangha
places.lineage: Plum Village / Vietnamese Thien (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Lay Plum Village sangha established 2008; monthly Days of Mindfulness in the tradition of Thich Nhat Hanh.

places.name: Nihonji Soto Zen Temple
places.notes: Sole Sotoshu-listed Soto Zen temple in Singapore, per official Sotoshu international temple directory.

places.name: Dharma Drum Mountain Singapore
places.notes: Singapore branch of Dharma Drum Mountain Buddhist Association; offers Chan meditation classes and Sheng-yen lineage teachings.

places.name: Awaken Mindfulness Centre Singapore
places.notes: Plum Village-aligned mindfulness sangha and practice centre in Singapore. Coordinates approximate Singapore centre.

places.name: Foguang Shan Singapore
places.notes: Foguangshan branch in Singapore. Coordinates approximate Singapore centre.

places.name: Chung Tai Chan Monastery Singapore
places.notes: Chung Tai branch in Singapore. Coordinates approximate Singapore centre.
